product.applications: CO2 removal, gas drying, hydrogen treatment, air separation
product.specs: Aperture 10Å; high adsorption capacity for polar compounds and moisture
product.overview: 13X provides higher pore access and higher moisture and CO2 capacity for demanding drying and purification duties.
product.technicalNotes: Suitable for systems needing broader adsorption capacity, especially where higher moisture or CO2 loading is expected.
product.documentation: CoA, TDS, MSDS available on request
product.datasheet: Use where a higher-capacity adsorbent is needed beyond the selectivity range of 4A or 5A.
